title: El extraordinario viaje de Lucius Dumb
original_title: El extraordinario viaje de Lucius Dumb
overview: Animation film about Human Rights of Children to a younger audience in a dynamic and entertaining. A story about the values​​, need and equal justice in the first years of life, when it's necessary to have someone to fight for them.
